title: Compulsion Games splits from Xbox and seeks work as a support studio after eight years
summary: The studio behind South of Midnight becomes independent and offers its services for co-development and support projects.

title: Kingdom Hearts will celebrate its 25th anniversary with a special event at D23 and news of the fourth installment is expected
summary: Square Enix has confirmed a panel for August where Kingdom Hearts 4 could be shown, while anticipation among fans grows.

title: Nintendo evaluates launching an OLED version of Switch 2 but is concerned about the possible price increase
summary: Various press reports confirm that the company is considering an OLED screen for its next console, although the additional cost raises internal doubts.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced suffers serious bugs and a union strike over layoffs at Ubisoft Barcelona
summary: Players report a bug that sinks ships in a comical way, while workers protest against staff cuts and the company remains silent.

title: Beast of Reincarnation presents a new combat trailer and the media highlight its perfect parry system
summary: The promising action RPG from the creators of Pokémon receives detailed coverage of its mechanics and progress.

title: My Chemical Romance singer stops a concert to talk to fans about Baldur's Gate 3 and classic RPGs
summary: Gerard Way interrupts his performance to talk about role-playing video games and confesses he hasn't played BG3 yet, sparking a reaction from Larian Studios.

title: Dying Light: The Beast cancels its PS4 and Xbox One versions due to lack of power and memory
summary: Techland confirms that the spin-off will not arrive on last-generation consoles as it considers they do not meet the technical requirements.

title: More than 20 unions join the request for Rockstar to recognize the video game workers' union
summary: Users go to the Xbox Player Voice portal to demand an end to the wave of layoffs in the industry, while union organizations pressure the company.

title: Industry veterans warn that consoles must innovate to survive and that the thousand-dollar price tag is a real risk
summary: Executives and designers believe that delaying the next generation could be beneficial, but that high costs threaten market viability.

title: Analysts forecast console sales will drop to historic lows in 2026, not even GTA 6 will prevent it
summary: A new industry report predicts a record decline in hardware sales next year, despite the release of the highly anticipated title from Rockstar.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2 incorporates an infinite teleport stone but its director insists it is not mandatory to use it
summary: After complaints about the scarcity of fast travel, Capcom adds an unlimited option but developers ask players not to see it as an imposition.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2 runs at 30 fps or more on Switch 2, exceeding initial expectations
summary: Initial tests of the port for Nintendo's new console show stable performance, according to sources close to development.

title: Jon Hamm was a candidate to star in L.A. Noire but his Mad Men co-star was chosen for being more expensive
summary: The Mad Men actor was considered for the lead role in Rockstar's game, but it ultimately went to Aaron Staton, also from the series.

title: George Lucas defends artificial intelligence as inevitable and compares his rejection to preferring horses over cars
summary: The filmmaker declares in an interview that AI is the future and that there is nothing to be done to avoid it, generating controversy in the industry.

title: Activision deactivates Call of Duty Black Ops playlists after detecting exploits on PlayStation
summary: The ports of Black Ops 1 and 2 suffer from hacker issues while the company takes measures to mitigate the impact on players.

title: Ubisoft announces a new selective model and promises upcoming installments of Assassin's Creed, Far Cry, and Ghost Recon
summary: The French company confirms that this year will be quieter in releases as it restructures its strategy and reduces reliance on major titles.

title: Sony faces an antitrust complaint in Mexico for its decision to eliminate physical format on PlayStation
summary: The transition to digital format triggers a legal complaint, while former Xbox executives think that the company waited for Rockstar to make the first move.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 will be promoted by the star of the most anticipated movie of 2026 and a classic mode is requested
summary: Fans demand a mode that removes modern new features, while a collaboration with the actor from the next big movie is announced.

title: Palworld guides: boss locations, resources, and settings to improve the game experience
summary: Different portals share tips on how to get key items, optimize construction, and customize the game's settings.

title: Christopher Nolan's Odyssey sparks criticism for the use of artificial intelligence and tips are offered to watch it in the best quality
summary: The adaptation of the Homeric classic generates debate while Spanish cinemas prepare to screen it with the highest possible quality.
